5269.notes: Charming vintage Hawaii cottage with consistent knotty-pine details, wood ceilings, and retro-cottagecore aesthetic; all 12 photos show the actual unit interior, exterior, and private grounds—ignored landscaping and distant tree/vegetation shots that don't define the property itself.

669707579866610379.notes: All 12 images are neighborhood/resort amenity photos (shared pools, golf courses, beaches, aerial/drone views, landscaping, tennis courts) — zero photos of the actual rental unit interior, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, or private outdoor space. 1034311601238678065.notes: Bedroom shown in 4 photos with dated floral bedding and basic wood furnishings; ocean view visible from unit window in photos 2-4; photos 5-11 show building exterior, shared pool, beach, and amenities (ignored per instructions); no kitchen or bathroom photos provided.
